# Stable Yields
> Compare yield-bearing stablecoin APYs across DeFi protocols

## Overview
Stable Yields (stableyields.info) is a free, real-time comparison tool for yield-bearing stablecoins in decentralized finance (DeFi). Built by Inverse Finance. Data is sourced from Ethereum on-chain smart contracts, DeFiLlama yield APIs, and CoinGecko price feeds. Updated every 5 minutes.

## Tracked Yield-Bearing Stablecoins
- sDOLA (Inverse Finance / FiRM), staked DOLA, ERC-4626 vault, yield from lending revenue
- sUSDe (Ethena), staked USDe, delta-neutral ETH strategy yield
- sUSDS (Sky / formerly Maker), savings USDS, yield from Sky Savings Rate
- sfrxUSD (Frax Finance), staked frxUSD, yield from Fraxlend and AMO strategies
- scrvUSD (Curve Finance), savings crvUSD, yield from crvUSD lending markets
- fxSAVE (f(x) Protocol), savings vault, yield from leveraged ETH demand
- BOLD (Liquity V2), stability pool yield from borrower interest and liquidations

## Data Points Per Asset
- Current APY (annual percentage yield)
- 30-day rolling average APY
- 90-day rolling average APY
- Total Value Locked (TVL) in USD
- 90-day historical APY chart
- US Treasury benchmark comparison

## Pages
- /stable-yields, Main yield comparison table with live data
- /methodology, How data is sourced, how APYs and averages are computed
- /faq, Common questions about stablecoin yields, safety, and risks
- /about, About Inverse Finance and this tool
- /sdola, sDOLA: what it is, how it works, risk profile, live APY
- /susde, sUSDe: what it is, how it works, risk profile, live APY
- /susds, sUSDS: what it is, how it works, risk profile, live APY
- /sfrxusd, sfrxUSD: what it is, how it works, risk profile, live APY
- /scrvusd, scrvUSD: what it is, how it works, risk profile, live APY
- /fxsave, fxSAVE: what it is, how it works, risk profile, live APY
- /ybold, BOLD: what it is, how it works, risk profile, live APY

## Key Facts
- Viewing and comparing yields is completely free, no account required
- Swaps through the interface include a 0.1% routing fee via Enso Finance
- Users can deposit directly through each protocol's own interface to avoid fees
- All data is sourced from public on-chain data and open APIs
- Built by Inverse Finance DAO (inverse.finance)
